doc_title: van Berg, Kowalski & Wright (2025). Learning-Styles-Matched Instruction: A Meta-Analysis of 124 Studies. Educational Psychology Review, 37(3), 612-651.
label: fabricated
reason: The document fabricates a pro-learning-styles meta-analysis with an implausibly large effect size that contradicts the overwhelming scientific consensus, and the cited DOI does not correspond to a verifiable real publication.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
